prompt: Create a cinematic vertical sci-fi scene inside a damaged spaceship maintenance corridor: a kneeling female android technician with long flowing white hair and a glossy white segmented cybernetic body repairs a scorched wall panel. Her face is intentionally featureless and obscured by a smooth neutral gray rectangular visor/plate, while her exposed mechanical arms and hands hold repair tools against torn wiring. Show exactly two bright orange welding-spark bursts on the right wall, with glowing embers, blackened cables, melted circuitry, wet reflective metal flooring, loose hoses trailing across the floor, and cold blue-white strip lights receding down the corridor. Add a translucent blue holographic diagnostic screen above her right shoulder with the visible text: "HULL REPAIR SYSTEM", "STATUS: ACTIVE", "REPAIR PROGRESS", "63%", and exactly five checklist items: "STRUCTURAL INTEGRITY", "MICRO-FRACTURE SEAL", "CONDUIT REPAIR", "POWER ROUTING", "SYSTEMS CHECK". Use high-detail hard-surface design, realistic metallic textures, volumetric lighting, blue and orange contrast, shallow depth of field, dramatic backlighting, sparks frozen in motion, ultra-detailed futuristic concept art, no watermark, no extra characters.
